{{Infobox group
| name = Technicians
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] identifies as a specific kind of Technician.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Technicians]] can possess a fabricator gift.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c13">''The Engineer'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] is described as a master Technician.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
